description: Made of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartmentOne earphones gate on the topOne zipped compartment on the front with organiser pouches and a key holderOne concealed zipped pocket on the frontOne mesh pocket on the left side and a zipped pocket on the right side for enhanced spacePadded haul loop for easy carryingTwo adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the back for breathable comfortBranded zips and branding appliqué d on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfort and a twill tape design for styleWarranty: 1 year
